articles.title: Saudi Arabia slashes August crude prices for Asia by $11 a barrel in biggest cut in over 20 years
articles.summary: Saudi Arabia has slashed its crude oil prices for Asian customers by a significant $11 per barrel for August, the largest reduction in over two decades. This move reflects weakening demand in Asia and easing geopolitical tensions, which have stabilized global oil markets.

articles.title: Crude oil relief: OMCs may break even on petrol, diesel rates soon; what it means for retail prices
articles.summary: Public sector refiners have collectively absorbed losses of over Rs 75,000 crore during the first quarter of the current financial year.

articles.title: Taiwan's Unimicron targets $1.4 billion in global share sale at discounted price amid AI-driven chip demand
articles.summary: Taiwan's Unimicron Technology is aiming to raise approximately $1.4 billion through a global share offering, joining a trend of Asian semiconductor firms seeking international capital.

articles.title: 'Fresh Paneer' to '100% organic': FSSAI issues notices to multiple brands over misleading food claims
articles.summary: India's food regulator, FSSAI, has issued notices to several brands, including 'Heritage Fresh Paneer', for misleading claims on their packaging. The authority is cracking down on labels that could deceive consumers, such as 'fresh' paneer or 'vegan' spreads.

articles.title: CCI may consider market study on digital economy
articles.summary: In the past, it had conducted market study on AI to understand competition dynamics

articles.title: Growth, not gloom: Morgan Stanley keeps bullish stance on Indian equities
articles.summary: India's market dip is likely temporary, with Morgan Stanley predicting a rebound driven by accelerating economic growth. Concerns about long-term prospects, including demographics and AI's impact on services, are seen as overstated.

articles.title: 2.5 hrs for 31 km! Infy co-founder Kris Gopalakrishnan calls out Bengaluru's traffic nightmare
articles.summary: Bengaluru’s traffic woes are back in the spotlight after Kris Gopalakrishnan’s latest commute turned into a two-and-a-half-hour ordeal.

articles.title: The real cost of Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce's wedding will shock you
articles.summary: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce's rumoured Madison Square Garden wedding could cost $10–$20 million. Here's how the venue, security, flowers and entertainment break down in full.

articles.title: Man misses ITR e-verification while caring for ailing father; ITAT orders ₹17 lakh refund
articles.summary: The tribunal held that there was no dispute regarding the TDS deducted from the taxpayer's rental income, and the corresponding tax credit was already available in the department's records.

articles.title: Luxury Unveiled: How Aamir Khan Built a Multi-Crore Real Estate & Car Kingdom
articles.summary: Explore Aamir Khan’s ₹1,862 crore empire: Mumbai sea-facing flats, Panchgani farmhouse, Beverly Hills mansion, luxury cars, film success, philanthropy, and global investments.

articles.title: Career Shock: Who Wins When AI Takes Over the Office
articles.summary: Discover which careers will thrive and survive AI disruption: creative pros, healthcare workers, technologists, leaders, skilled artisans, educators, and human connectors remain indispensable.

articles.title: Solar panel failed to cut power bills: Consumer court orders firm to pay ₹25,265 as compensation
articles.summary: The commission held the company guilty of deficiency in service after the complainant alleged poor system performance and excess charges collected towards net metering

articles.title: Crude comeback: IOCL, HPCL buy 7 million barrels of energy supplies
articles.summary: Indian refiners Indian Oil Corp and Hindustan Petroleum Corp have secured millions of crude barrels from Angola, Nigeria, and Brazil to bolster national reserves. This strategic procurement follows a significant drawdown in stockpiles due to Strait of Hormuz disruptions.

articles.title: How Ahmed Khan Transforms Mumbai Living Into A Millionaire’s Dream
articles.summary: Explore Ahmed Khan's Mumbai mansion featuring Versace-themed interiors, MF Husain art, a luxury Batmobile, panoramic balcony views, designer closet, and an opulent dining area.

articles.title: 'Sun rahe ho na, Binod': PM Modi's Panchayat reference steals the show at Gujarat event
articles.summary: The phrase "Sun rahe ho na, Binod" is inspired by the immensely popular web series Panchayat, where the character Binod became the centre of one of India's most widely shared internet memes

articles.title: The world's tiniest nations have no airports — and their reason will fascinate you
articles.summary: From Andorra in the Pyrenees to Monaco's 2 sq km and Vatican City, here are 6 fascinating countries where planes simply cannot land — and how they stay connected to the world.

articles.title: Saudi low-cost carrier flyadeal begins India operations with daily Hyderabad-Riyadh flights
articles.summary: Saudi Arabia's budget airline, flyadeal, has officially landed in India, commencing its maiden service between Hyderabad and Riyadh. This new daily flight, operated by an Airbus A320, significantly enhances Hyderabad Airport's global reach, particularly to the Middle East.

articles.title: A prince that never became a king: The heartbreaking final chapter of Neymar's story
articles.summary: Neymar retired from international football after Brazil's 2-1 World Cup loss to Norway at MetLife Stadium — the same venue where he scored his first Brazil goal 16 years ago.

articles.title: 'Just a music lover': Investor Vijay Kedia surprises followers with this unique musical instrument
articles.summary: The ace investor shared a light-hearted video on LinkedIn, saying people do not need to be musicians to enjoy music.

articles.title: Time to ditch petrol! These 5 electric scooters under ₹1 lakh will change how you commute

articles.title: Louis Vuitton founder Bernard Arnault faces ₹245 crore tax bill after French court ruling
articles.summary: The ruling affects Arnault and his wife and stems from the tax treatment of funds received from a Belgian holding company linked to shares in luxury giant LVMH Moët Hennessy Louis Vuitton

articles.title: "Yes, it's my last one": Cristiano Ronaldo's most emotional press conference ever
articles.summary: Cristiano Ronaldo confirmed FIFA World Cup 2026 will be his last before Portugal's Round of 16 clash with Spain — here's everything he said in his most emotional press conference.

articles.title: How is Gujarat’s Morbi ceramic cluster driving India’s LNG demand?
articles.summary: Morbi ceramic clusters that were shut during the Middle East conflict are driving the LNG demand in India due to the non-availability of propane as fuel.

articles.title: ITR filing FY 2025-26: Top 10 mistakes taxpayers should avoid for income tax returns online filing - check list
articles.summary: ITR filing FY 2025-26: Before filing, compare your income and TDS details with documents such as Annual Information Statement (AIS), Form 26AS, and Form 16/16A. Any mismatches in data can not only lead to income tax notices, but also delayed refunds.

articles.title: War pause eases pressure on FY27 fiscal deficit target as govt sees improving outlook
articles.summary: The latest fiscal accounts nevertheless reflect the impact of front-loaded government spending.

articles.title: Nuclear power push: India eyes uranium supply pact with Australia during PM Modi’s visit
articles.summary: Australia, which has nearly one-third of the world's known uranium reserves, signed a framework agreement with India over a decade ago.

articles.title: Gold price prediction today: Will gold prices see limited upside? Key levels to watch out for July 6, 2026 week
articles.summary: Gold price prediction today: Gold prices are likely to see a limited upside because of high inflation in the US, says Manav Modi, Senior Analyst, Commodity Research at Motilal Oswal Financial Services Ltd.

articles.title: Apple not so 'fruitful' for Himachal? Climate pressures hill state's Rs 5,000 crore economy
articles.summary: Himachal Pradesh's Rs 5,000 crore apple economy faces a severe climate crisis, with production projected to plummet by nearly 40% this year. Unseasonal rains, hailstorms, and erratic weather have significantly impacted output, affecting an estimated 2.5 lakh farming families.

articles.title: CG Semi plant is further proof that the Semicon India Program is gaining momentum: PM Modi
articles.summary: Vellayan Subbiah, Executive Vice Chairman, CG Power earlier told Business Today that semiconductors are becoming a national priority and India needs ten more companies to join in this effort.

articles.title: Rupee slips 10 paise as stronger dollar and geopolitical jitters outweigh positive cues
articles.summary: The Indian rupee weakened against the US dollar, opening the week down 10 paise at 95.28 due to a stronger dollar globally and geopolitical uncertainties. Despite favorable global cues like falling oil prices, the rupee failed to gain, indicating underlying market fragility.

articles.title: Bank holiday today: Where are banks shut on July 6? Check state-wise list
articles.summary: Plan your bank visits carefully as several branches will be closed on specific dates this July due to regional holidays. West Bengal and Mizoram observe closures today, July 6.

China's Z.ai a challenger to OpenAI and Anthropic
articles.summary: A Chinese AI startup, Z.ai, is making waves with its new model, GLM-5.2, offering advanced coding and AI agent features at a lower cost than US rivals like OpenAI and Anthropic.

articles.title: USTR probe action creates uncertainty for India, others
articles.summary: India faces renewed trade uncertainty as the US Trade Representative moves forward with a probe into forced labor, potentially replacing existing tariffs. Hearings are underway, with a proposed 12.5% tariff impacting over 50 nations, including India.

articles.title: CaratLane may go to West Asia Damas way
articles.summary: Titan's online jewellery arm, CaratLane, is eyeing a West Asian debut through its recent acquisition, Damas Jewellery. While recent regional conflicts have temporarily halted expansion plans, CaratLane sees Damas' extensive store network as a strategic entry point.

articles.title: For urban buyers, Saturdays, Sundays witness 2/3rd of weekly spend
articles.summary: Urban Indians significantly boost their spending on Saturdays and Sundays, with a 1.6 times higher expenditure compared to weekdays. Fashion, entertainment, electronics, and dining see a marked increase as people enjoy leisure time.
